deploys.msg: 10/10 luxury nail salon: 8 AI gallery images, cursor glow, shimmer, SVG icons, booking panel
Before/after slider, FAQ accordion, sticky CTA, text animations, grain texture
Copy & UI overhaul: rewrite all text for authenticity, add service areas
Full image overhaul: 4 unique Leonardo AI scenes, Ken Burns, parallax
Conversion architecture: FAQ, testimonials, scarcity, credential bar
Cowork foundation: about-me, voice, anti-AI, templates
Add DESIGN.md system + universal client generator
Stats fix + counter fallback + real screenshots
Cleanup: kill dead hoursLog + dedupe tools + .gitignore debug files
Add smoke test + updater + error fallback
